title: Farmer's Heaters
description: Now requires fuel to cook your food
body:
**📖 About:**

**Farmer's Heater** is a small utility addon mod for [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) (required), and the mod [My Nether's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/my-nethers-delight) (optional), I strongly suggest checking out these two mods as they are a great addition to the vanilla game.

**🎂 Features :**

This mod makes the stove and nether stove found in FD and MND that requires fuel.

it delete the original stove in Farmer's Delight, changes it to ones that needs fuel, which is added by my mod [Central Heater](https://modrinth.com/mod/central-heater)

That means the original stoves found in FD and MND can no longer cook food in the pot:

![image7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4aa82b5d392441075252043f8970b10447217a3_0.webp)

Instead, burning fuels can provide heat to the cooking pot based on the fuel and the type of stove used.

![iamge1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9647da6c9cd8176dcd1ef096391347c9b7eaac18_0.webp)

My mod Central Heater adds a new level of heat generate through burning soul related items, indicated by the blue flame.

Some dish (most of the food added by My Nether's Delight) that comes from the nether requires super heating, other dishes can be cooked through normal flames.

Make sure you are using the correct level of fire to cook your food, otherwise it will not work.

![image5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adf0aa361d96b1eacf55958d772275e1f2fd9e13.png)

![image3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd49cea9a1614abf3048014d9ea3366d75a1312e.png)

At last I added a new type of knife called sturdy knife, made by sturdy ingot found in my mod Central Heater, it functions the same with other types of knife in Farmer's Heater, and is a little bit stronger than the iron knife.

![image6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3eb013b0ad38bc41e8256a82b9aff5efde8ec5f.png)

**📝 FAQ:**

 - **Can super heated stove cook normal foods?**

    It can't, these two level of heat are incompatible with each other, since one comes from the overworld and the other comes from the nether

 - **Can I use this mod in my modpack?**

    If any modpack dev sees this mod, please add this mod to your modpack, Im begging, pleaseeee😭😭😭.

 - **When? Forge 1.20.1 Version**

    I am developing it, it may come out soon!
